notes: IMPORTANT — Holes conflict: 1golf.eu and golflux.com consistently report 9 holes / par 36 (length 3,022 yards). kolfers.com shows 18 holes / par 72 — this appears to be an error (kolfers may be counting 9-hole rounds as 18 by doubling). golfdd.com and golflux.com both confirm 9-hole layout. Used 9 holes / par 36 as authoritative. GPS coordinates from golfdd.com (16.399862, 101.135134) are SUSPECT — this lat/lng falls in Phetchabun/Phitsanulok area, NOT Nakhon Ratchasima (which is ~14.97°N, 102.07°E). The Plus Code 'X36W+2JC' from golflux.com places it in Nong Phai Lom, Mueang NR district — coordinates marked as null pending verification. Army golf course at Camp Suranaree — visitors may face access restrictions. Green fees are very low (250-500 THB) reflecting military course pricing. Caddie fee timing-based: 150 THB before 7:00am, 300 THB after 8:00am per golfdd.com.

holes.note: 1golf.eu, golflux.com, and golfdd.com all confirm 9 holes. kolfers.com incorrectly shows 18 holes — likely doubled. Layout is 9-hole with option to play 18 (two loops).

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: golfdd.com shows 300 THB (Tue/Wed/Fri before 8:00am) and 160 THB after 8:00am. 1golf.eu reports 250 THB weekday for 18 holes. Using 300 THB as weekday representative. These are very low military course rates.

caddie_fee_thb.note: 150 THB before 7:00am; 300 THB after 8:00am per golfdd.com. kolfers.com confirms 260 THB for 18 holes.

cart_fee_thb.note: kolfers.com: 500 THB for 18 holes, shared cart 700 THB. golfdd.com: 500 THB (18 holes), 700 THB (up to 2 golfers), 250 THB (9 holes).

caddie_required.note: Caddie is available but no source explicitly states it is mandatory.

cart_required.note: kolfers.com states 'Cart not allowed on Fairway' — suggests cart is available but not mandatory.

website.note: Military website — may require verification for current accessibility.

latitude.note: golfdd.com lists 16.399862 but this falls in Phetchabun/Phitsanulok — clearly wrong for Nakhon Ratchasima. Plus Code X36W+2JC (from golflux.com) places it in Nong Phai Lom, Mueang NR district (~14.97°N, 102.07°E range). Coordinates require manual Google Maps verification before use.

longitude.note: See latitude note. golfdd.com value of 101.135134 is incorrect for Nakhon Ratchasima.

distance_from_bangkok_km.note: Nakhon Ratchasima city is approximately 260 km northeast of Bangkok via Highway 2. Requires verification.

drive_time_from_bangkok_min.note: Approximately 3.5 hours from Bangkok off-peak. Requires verification.

google_maps_url.note: No direct Google Maps URL found. Address: Rajadamnoen Rd., Suranaree Camp, Nakhon Ratchasima 30000 (also listed as Nong Phai Lom, Mueang NR district).
